_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct hypothesis testing using statistical processes.
reference_document_element_description: Design and analyze controlled experiments (A/B tests), including hypothesis specification, randomization oversight, results interpretation, and recommendation delivery.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-002 (AI, cosine: 0.513), AB-K-005 (AB, cosine: 0.480).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.521). Shared vocabulary: [hypothesis]. DCWF-only terms [conduct, processes, statistical, testing, using] vs WIDAI-only terms [analyze, b, controlled, delivery, design, experiments] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.896, R=0.847). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Conduct hypothesis testing using statistical processes." and "Design and analyze controlled experiments (A/B tests), including hypothesis spec" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.521 ≈ STS 0.521 (gap 0.000). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [hypothesis] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.5%. Shared tokens: [hypothesis]. DCWF-only: [conduct, processes, statistical, testing, using]. WIDAI-only: [analyze, b, controlled, delivery, design, experiments].
